description: Implement resume reconciliation (trailer-on-every-integrated-commit, integrated set = trailer-bearing commits reachable from the plan-branch TIP only - W-1; branch -D guardrails/<runId>/* before any trailer read) and the reset --hard <taskBase> + git clean -fd retry (taskBase captured at assignment, distinct from preHead) - making ResumeAndResetRetryTests pass without editing them
